error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Weather Risk Bridge service. If you use the Home Assistant app on this host, try http://HOME_ASSISTANT_HOST_IP:8099 — the app hostname often does not resolve, which means the app never sees the request.

user.title: Weather Risk Bridge
user.description:
Connect to the Weather Risk Bridge service and set the US location to track.

Service URL: on Home Assistant OS the integration tries to discover the local Weather Risk Bridge app IP automatically. If connection fails or the app logs show no request, use http://HOME_ASSISTANT_HOST_IP:8099 (port 8099 is published by the app). Do not rely on http://weather-risk-bridge:8099 unless Supervisor DNS resolves that name on your system.

Latitude / Longitude: decimal degrees (US west longitudes are negative).

Label: friendly name such as Home (becomes the entity slug).

US locations only (NWS/SPC).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Weather Risk Bridge
reconfigure.description: Update the service connection and latitude/longitude. For the same-host app, prefer the discovered app IP or http://HOME_ASSISTANT_HOST_IP:8099 if the app hostname does not resolve.

init.title: Weather Risk Bridge options
init.description: Update the service connection and latitude/longitude. For the same-host app, prefer the discovered app IP or http://HOME_ASSISTANT_HOST_IP:8099 if the app hostname does not resolve.
